title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 258.083 - General assembly may appropriate funds for grants to parks
text:
258.083.  General assembly may appropriate funds for grants to parks. — The general assembly may appropriate funds to the department of natural resources for the purpose of making grants to local parks and related institutions, and the department shall administer and expend such funds in accordance with the terms of the appropriation.
(L. 1985 S.B. 282)
